description: Style Note This Summer lino perros presents a range of wallets that capture your heart with their classic styling and muted colours. Pair it with Western or ethnic outfits for a look that exudes confidence. Its multiple pockets and slots help you keep your monetary essentials organised- in style. Product Details Two fold textured brown wallet with press down clasp Six credit card slots with one slip pocket on one side and two compartments (one with a zippered separator) with a slip pocket on the other side Embossed branding on front Materials and Care Synthetic Wipe with damp cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 9.5 cm Width: 19 cm
